name: Team AOC
subject: The COVID package passed! Here’s what it includes →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria won’t stop fighting for us, so we can’t stop fighting either.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210312-1941-header&t=1&akid=1941%2E2526796%2EBdVyVQ)
Yesterday, Democrats finally passed the $1.9 trillion COVID relief package.
Here’s what the package includes:
* $1,400 relief checks for people making up to $75,000
* Relief checks for adult dependents
* $3,000-3,600 additional funds per child this year
* $300 weekly unemployment insurance
* Cheaper ACA healthcare exchange premiums
* Free COBRA premiums through September
* Housing assistance for both renters and homeowners
* A tax exemption for the first $10,200 in unemployment benefits
* Expansion of funeral assistance into 2021
* Assistance for independent restaurants and bars
* State and local funding for services like public transportation

Alexandria fought for these provisions and more, because it’s what working families need _and deserve._
This was not an easy victory. Republicans, and even some Democrats, fought for fewer and smaller relief checks and against some of these desperately needed provisions.
But Alexandria worked with her colleagues to keep Congress accountable to the working people who elected them. Alexandria won’t stop fighting for us, so we can’t stop fighting either.
[Make your first $3 contribution now to help Alexandria keep fighting to advance policies that will ensure an equitable recovery from COVID and that will protect working families.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8151?refcode=em20210312-1941&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1941%2E2526796%2EBdVyVQ)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8151?refcode=em20210312-1941&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1941%2E2526796%2EBdVyVQ)**
When conservatives fought to steepen the relief checks phase out, Alexandria fought back and made sure eligible adult dependents would receive relief checks, and helped win recurring relief checks for each child throughout the year up to $3,600 for children under 6 and $3,000 for children 17 and under. She also helped win federal tax exemptions for the first $10,200 in unemployment income.
Last year, Alexandria fought for and won up to $7,000 for families to cover the cost of laying a loved one to rest. Now that coverage has been expanded to cover funeral costs for families into 2021.
[If you can, your first $3 contribution today will go a long way in making sure we have the resources required to keep AOC’s seat and keep her fighting for us.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8151?refcode=em20210312-1941&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1941%2E2526796%2EBdVyVQ)
Anything you can give right now will help ensure Alexandria has the resources to keep her focus on passing legislation — not fundraising.
Thank you for everything you do,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210312-1941-footer&t=23&refcode2=1941_2526796_BdVyVQ&akid=1941%2E2526796%2EBdVyVQ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=1941%2E2526796%2EBdVyVQ) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=1941%2E2526796%2EBdVyVQ) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=1941%2E2526796%2EBdVyVQ)
Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=1941%2E2526796%2EBdVyVQ)**. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=1941%2E2526796%2EBdVyVQ). To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
Email us: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: Tom Fitton
subject: A Pelosi Coup?
body:
COVID Censorship – In Court!

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR RECORDS OF PELOSI CALL WITH PENTAGON CHIEF

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53149&L=22339&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1TOWdhU2FyYTRENCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMxMzAxNDU1Ng==]

In psychology, the term _projection_ describes the act of attributing
your own negative trait to someone else. Nobody does this better than
Nancy Pelosi. If you’ve read her January 8 letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53149&L=22330&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3BlYWtlci5nb3YvbmV3c3Jvb20vMTgyMS0wP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMzEzMDE0NTU2]
attacking then-President
Trump to her colleagues you would agree. In it, she talked about her
anti-Trump phone call to the nation’s top military chief.

We want to know more, so we filed a FOIA suit against the U.S.
Department of Defense for records of Pelosi’s January 8, 2021,
telephone call with Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Mark Milley
(_Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Defense_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53149&L=22329&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9kLXBlbG9zaS1qb2ludC1jaGllZnMtcGhvbmUtY2FsbC1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDA1OTMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMzEzMDE0NTU2]
(No
1:21-cv-00593)).

Pelosi acknowledged the call in her January 8 letter to her fellow
Democrats. In the letter, Pelosi described her purported discussion
with Milley earlier that same day:

“This morning, I spoke to the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff
Mark Milley to discuss available precautions for preventing an
unstable president from initiating military hostilities or accessing
the launch codes and ordering a nuclear strike. The situation of this
unhinged President could not be more dangerous, and we must do
everything that we can to protect the American people from his
unbalanced assault on our country and our democracy.”

We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after
the Defense Department failed to respond to a January 11, 2021,
Freedom of Information (FOIA) request for:

* Any and all records regarding, concerning, or related to the
telephone call between House Speaker Nancy Pelosi and General Mark
Milley on or about January 8, 2021. This request includes, but is not
limited to, any and all transcripts, recordings, and/or summaries of
the call, as well as any other records produced in preparation for,
during, and/or pursuant to the call.
* Any and all additional records of communication between Gen.
Milley and House Speaker Nancy Pelosi between November 1, 2020 and the
present.

In a section of the letter headed “Removing the President From
Office,” Pelosi also told her colleagues:

“As you know, there is growing momentum around the invocation of the
25th Amendment, which would allow the Vice President and a majority of
the Cabinet to remove the President for his incitement of insurrection
and the danger he still poses. Yesterday, Leader Schumer and I placed
a call with Vice President Pence, and we still hope to hear from him
as soon as possible with a positive answer as to whether he and the
Cabinet will honor their oath to the Constitution and the American
people.”

If Speaker Pelosi’s description of her conversation with General
Milley is true, it sets a dangerous precedent that could undermine the
president’s role as commander in chief and the separation of powers.
Our lawsuit aims to uncover truth about the call.

The Wall Street Journal editorial page called her call “A Coup of
Pelosi’s Own
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53149&L=22340&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud3NqLmNvbS9hcnRpY2xlcy9hLWNvdXAtb2YtcGVsb3Npcy1vd24tMTE2MTAxNDg3NDBd4oCdOj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMxMzAxNDU1Ng==

Mrs. Pelosi’s call to Gen. Milley is itself a violation of the
separation of powers by seeking to inject herself into an
executive-branch military decision. She can offer advice all she
wants, but this call at this time has the sound of an order. It might
even be construed by some as its own little coup—conniving with the
military to relieve of command the person who remains the elected
President.

It is remarkable, but par for the course, that it is up to Judicial
Watch is doing the heavy lifting to get more details about this
dangerous Pelosi call as Congress and a corrupted partisan media sit
on their thumbs in the face of yet another attack on constitutional
governance.

DID THE CDC COMMUNICATE WITH BIG TECH ABOUT COVID-19?

Big Tech has taken upon itself the role of Ministry of Health Truth,
censoring users and even doctors with which it disagrees. To what
extent has the Centers for Disease Control (CDC) been involved in
this?

To find out, we filed a FOIA suit against the Department of Health and
Human Services (HHS) seeking records of communications between the CDC
and Big Tech about COVID-19.

We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after
HHS failed to reply to a September 15, 2020, FOIA request (_Judicial
Watch v. U.S. Department of Health of Human Services_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53149&L=22341&F=T&]
(No.
1:21-cv-00625)). Judicial Watch requested:

Any and all records of communication between CDC officials and/or
employees and employees, agents, and/or representatives of Google,
Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn, and YouTube concerning,
regarding, or relating to COVID-19 related content on company
platforms. Such records include, but are not limited to, any advice or
instructions issued on disinformation re COVID-19.

The CDC was required to respond to Judicial Watch’s request by
October 29, 2020, but failed to do so.

The public has the right to know about CDC’s involvement in Big
Tech’s outrageous censorship of Americans, including doctors, who
raise questions about the COVID-19 response. The Biden administration
should stop stonewalling and release the records about the CDC’s
role in suppressing the free speech of Americans.

ICE ARRESTED 60% FEWER ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS IN FEBRUARY

As I noted in my recent CPAC
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53149&L=22342&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1KOURzVjgtWG5MNCZ0PTMxN3Ndc3BlZWNoJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMzEzMDE0NTU2
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53149&L=22343&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdG9tLWZpdHRvbnMtd2Vla2x5LXVwZGF0ZS9mYXVjaS1pbnZlc3RpZ2F0aW9uLXVwZGF0ZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTMwMTQ1NTY=],
Joe Biden “has launched the most significant attack on immigration
law in American history.” And the consequences are a humanitarian,
national security, and public health disaster on the border.

Here, from our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog, are details
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53149&L=22344&F=T&]
of “Biden’s Border Crisis”:

Predictably, the Biden administration’s disastrous immigration
policies are having a detrimental impact on the U.S. even though they
have only been in place for weeks. In that short time, the nation has
seen an overwhelming flood of illegal alien minors slam Customs and
Border Protection (CBP) and a huge drop in adult fugitives arrested by
Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE). Last month the
administration restricted
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53149&L=22345&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaWNlLmdvdi9kb2NsaWIvbmV3cy9yZWxlYXNlcy8yMDIxLzAyMTgyMV9jaXZpbC1pbW1pZ3JhdGlvbi1lbmZvcmNlbWVudF9pbnRlcmltLWd1aWRhbmNlLnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMxMzAxNDU1Ng==]
ICE
from making arrests by reducing agents’ enforcement priorities and
forcing them to seek written permission from senior supervisors before
arresting fugitives. Not surprisingly, it has resulted in a huge
decrease in illegal immigrant arrests. ICE data reviewed by a
mainstream newspaper reveals that the number of illegal aliens
arrested by ICE dropped more than 60% in February compared with the
last three months of the Trump administration. Deportations fell by
nearly the same amount, according to the figures.

In the meantime, more than 7,000 illegal immigrant minors
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53149&L=22346&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2JzbmV3cy5jb20vbmV3cy9taWdyYW50LWNoaWxkcmVuLXNoZWx0ZXJzLXByZS1wYW5kZW1pYy1sZXZlbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMzEzMDE0NTU2]
were
placed in U.S. shelters in February alone, according to government
data published by a separate national news outlet days earlier. “The
numbers in March indicate the steady rise has continued,” the story
reads. “During the first four days of the month, more than 1,500
unaccompanied migrant minors were taken into custody.” The Office of
Refugee Resettlement (ORR), a well-funded branch of the Department of
Health and Human Services (HHS), is charged with providing care for
illegal aliens under the age of 18 which are classified as
Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC) by the government. ORR has been
receiving an average of 337 UAC a day. “The figure for the first
full month of the Biden administration is the most migrant children
the refugee office has ever received in a February,” the news
article states.

Just a few weeks ago, Judicial Watch reported that the UAC influx is
prompting a health emergency on the southern border and surrounding
communities. The increasing number of UAC illegally crossing the
border will soon overwhelm facilities in the middle of a global
pandemic, according to a congressional delegation’s letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53149&L=22222&F=T&]
to
Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas. “This surge also has
the capability to cause a COVID-19 outbreak at ports of entry and
other CBP facilities, which threatens the health of CBP personnel and
could result in the temporary closures of ports of entry,” the
legislators who sit on various House committees—including civil
rights, national security, and the environment—write. “Such
closures would greatly impact commerce and hamper the United States’
economic recovery,” the lawmakers continue. “The increase in
illegal immigration at the southern border presents a risk not only to
Border Patrol agents apprehending migrants who illegally cross the
border, but also to those communities into which those individuals
will relocate—likely leading to widespread COVID-19 infection and
fatalities.”

Concerns associated with the new onslaught in illegal immigration are
not limited to health issues. The attorney general in Montana points
out that methamphetamine trafficked by Mexican drug cartels has
wracked his state
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53149&L=22347&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kb2ptdC5nb3YvbW9udGFuYS1qb2lucy1sYXdzdWl0LXRvLXN0b3AtZGFuZ2Vyb3VzLWJpZGVuLWFkbWluaXN0cmF0aW9uLWltbWlncmF0aW9uLXBvbGljeS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTMwMTQ1NTY=].
“The problem will only be made worse if the Biden administration
continues to allow criminals to stay in the country,” according to
Montana Attorney General Austin Knudsen. This month Knudsen and his
counterpart in Arizona, sued the Biden administration to block the
outrageous directive restricting ICE from arresting illegal
immigrants. “Blindly releasing thousands of people, including
convicted criminals and those that may be spreading COVID-19 into our
state, is both unconscionable and a violation of federal law,” said
Arizona Attorney General Mark Brnovich. “This must be stopped now to
avoid a dangerous humanitarian crisis for the immigrants and the
people of Arizona.”

Their lawsuit asserts that Biden’s new policy will lead to an
increase in criminals and drugs as well as COVID-19 in Montana and
Arizona. It will also cause a hike in healthcare and law enforcement
costs, according to the complaint, which lists a multitude of
government agencies among defendants, including the Department of
Homeland Security (DHS). “The Removal Moratorium will directly
increase the number of aliens with final orders of removal who remain
in Arizona because they will not have been removed by DHS,” the
complaint says. “Additionally, knowledge that DHS has issued a
blanket moratorium on removals will encourage additional unauthorized
immigration to Arizona, and this increase in population will increase
Arizona’s incurred law enforcement and healthcare services costs
related to them.” Embedded in the court document are statements from
law enforcement officials who claim the states will be hurt by the new
initiatives.

CLEAR THINKING ON ELECTIONS FROM CLARENCE THOMAS

The controversies of the 2020 election haven’t gotten much traction
yet in the courts. However, U.S. Supreme Court Justice Clarence
Thomas, speaking for some of his colleagues, is unafraid to deal with
the legal issues of the 2020 election crisis. Our chief investigative
reporter, Micah Morrison, sets forth
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53149&L=22348&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi9jbGVhci10aGlua2luZy1vbi1lbGVjdGlvbnMtZnJvbS1jbGFyZW5jZS10aG9tYXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMzEzMDE0NTU2]
Thomas’ thinking in his _Investigative Bulletin_.

The Supreme Court shut the door on the 2020 election late last month,
but Justice Clarence Thomas got the last word. In a dissent directed
at the court’s decision not to take up two cases involving the
Pennsylvania Supreme Court and mail-in ballots, Thomas encapsulated
the world of electoral woe surrounding the 2020 presidential contest.

“We failed to settle this dispute before the election,” Thomas
wrote, “and thus provide clear rules. Now we again fail to provide
clear rules for future elections. The decision to leave election law
hidden beneath a shroud of doubt is baffling. By doing nothing, we
invite further confusion and erosion of voter confidence.”

The Pennsylvania cases centered on which state bodies have the
ultimate authority to set election rules, the legislature or the
judiciary? The U.S. Constitution says that the “Times, Places and
Manner of holding Elections...shall be prescribed in each State by the
Legislature thereof.” But state courts often intervene.

In the run-up to the presidential election, the Pennsylvania state
legislature gave all Pennsylvania voters the option of casting mail-in
ballots. But it left in place a November 3 deadline for ballots to be
in. Unhappy with the deadline, Democrats sued, arguing that in light
of the Covid-19 pandemic, the deadline violated a voting-rights clause
in the state constitution stating that elections “shall be free and
equal.” The Pennsylvania Supreme Court agreed, extending the
deadline for mail-in ballots by three days.

The U.S. Supreme Court declined petitions to intervene in the case
before the election. In February, with the election settled,
petitioners tried again. The high court again declined to hear the
cases, prompting the Thomas dissent.

It’s worth reading in its entirety
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53149&L=22211&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3VwcmVtZWNvdXJ0Lmdvdi9vcGluaW9ucy8yMHBkZi8yMC01NDJfMmM4My5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTMwMTQ1NTY=].
Thomas
zeroes in on two key issues: legislative versus judicial power, and
problems with mail-in voting.

Both “before and after the 2020 election,” Thomas notes,
“non-legislative officials in various States took it upon themselves
to set the rules,” resulting in “an unusually high number of
petitions and emergency applications” to the high court.

The Pennsylvania changes undermine confidence in the electoral system.
“Changing the rules in the middle of the game is bad enough,”
Thomas writes. “Such rule changes by officials who may lack the
authority to do so is even worse.”

Thomas is clear-sighted on the problems of mail-in voting. “Voting
by mail was traditionally limited to voters who had defined,
well-documented reasons to be absent,” he notes. But in recent
years, “many States have become more permissive, a trend greatly
accelerated by Covid-19.”

The opportunity for cheating in mail-in or absentee balloting is
substantial, Thomas writes. He cites a 2012 New York Times article
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53149&L=22338&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubnl0aW1lcy5jb20vMjAxMi8xMC8wNy91cy9wb2xpdGljcy9hcy1tb3JlLXZvdGUtYnktbWFpbC1mYXVsdHktYmFsbG90cy1jb3VsZC1pbXBhY3QtZWxlY3Rpb25zLmh0bWw/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTMwMTQ1NTY=]
that
notes the “vastly more prevalent” risk of fraud in mail-in
balloting. He cites ballot fraud cases in Pennsylvania and North
Carolina. He reminds us that Heather Gerken—now dean of Yale Law
School—told the Times in the same article that absentee voting
allows for “simpler and more effective alternatives to commit
fraud.”

At Judicial Watch, we’ve been tracking ballot fraud for years.
We’ve noted that as far back as 2005, the bi-partisan Carter-Baker
Commission warned that “absentee ballots remain the largest source
of potential voter fraud.” In July, we pointed to California
Governor Gavin Newsom’s rapid escalation of mail-in voting and
reported on a New Jersey fraud case. Read the JW bulletin here
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53149&L=19707&F=T&].

The thanks Justice Thomas got for his rigorous dissent was to be
attacked by Democrats and the progressive media. But the complex
issues surrounding election fraud aren’t going away. The country
owes Clarence Thomas a debt of gratitude for his clear thinking on the
coming crisis.

Until next week,

clean_body: COVID Censorship – In Court! [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR RECORDS OF PELOSI CALL WITH PENTAGON CHIEF [==] In psychology, the term projection describes the act of attributing your own negative trait to someone else. Nobody does this better than Nancy Pelosi. If you’ve read her January 8 letter [] attacking then-President Trump to her colleagues you would agree. In it, she talked about her anti-Trump phone call to the nation’s top military chief. We want to know more, so we filed a FOIA suit against the U.S. Department of Defense for records of Pelosi’s January 8, 2021, telephone call with Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Mark Milley (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Defense [] (No 1:21-cv-00593)). Pelosi acknowledged the call in her January 8 letter to her fellow Democrats. In the letter, Pelosi described her purported discussion with Milley earlier that same day: “This morning, I spoke to the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Mark Milley to discuss available precautions for preventing an unstable president from initiating military hostilities or accessing the launch codes and ordering a nuclear strike. The situation of this unhinged President could not be more dangerous, and we must do everything that we can to protect the American people from his unbalanced assault on our country and our democracy.” We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the Defense Department failed to respond to a January 11, 2021, Freedom of Information (FOIA) request for: Any and all records regarding, concerning, or related to the telephone call between House Speaker Nancy Pelosi and General Mark Milley on or about January 8, 2021. This request includes, but is not limited to, any and all transcripts, recordings, and/or summaries of the call, as well as any other records produced in preparation for, during, and/or pursuant to the call. Any and all additional records of communication between Gen. Milley and House Speaker Nancy Pelosi between November 1, 2020 and the present. In a section of the letter headed “Removing the President From Office,” Pelosi also told her colleagues: “As you know, there is growing momentum around the invocation of the 25th Amendment, which would allow the Vice President and a majority of the Cabinet to remove the President for his incitement of insurrection and the danger he still poses. Yesterday, Leader Schumer and I placed a call with Vice President Pence, and we still hope to hear from him as soon as possible with a positive answer as to whether he and the Cabinet will honor their oath to the Constitution and the American people.” If Speaker Pelosi’s description of her conversation with General Milley is true, it sets a dangerous precedent that could undermine the president’s role as commander in chief and the separation of powers. Our lawsuit aims to uncover truth about the call. The Wall Street Journal editorial page called her call “A Coup of Pelosi’s Own [== Mrs. Pelosi’s call to Gen. Milley is itself a violation of the separation of powers by seeking to inject herself into an executive-branch military decision. She can offer advice all she wants, but this call at this time has the sound of an order. It might even be construed by some as its own little coup—conniving with the military to relieve of command the person who remains the elected President. It is remarkable, but par for the course, that it is up to Judicial Watch is doing the heavy lifting to get more details about this dangerous Pelosi call as Congress and a corrupted partisan media sit on their thumbs in the face of yet another attack on constitutional governance. DID THE CDC COMMUNICATE WITH BIG TECH ABOUT COVID-19? Big Tech has taken upon itself the role of Ministry of Health Truth, censoring users and even doctors with which it disagrees. To what extent has the Centers for Disease Control (CDC) been involved in this? To find out, we filed a FOIA suit against the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) seeking records of communications between the CDC and Big Tech about COVID-19. We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after HHS failed to reply to a September 15, 2020, FOIA request (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Health of Human Services [==] (No. 1:21-cv-00625)). Judicial Watch requested: Any and all records of communication between CDC officials and/or employees and employees, agents, and/or representatives of Google, Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn, and YouTube concerning, regarding, or relating to COVID-19 related content on company platforms. Such records include, but are not limited to, any advice or instructions issued on disinformation re COVID-19. The CDC was required to respond to Judicial Watch’s request by October 29, 2020, but failed to do so. The public has the right to know about CDC’s involvement in Big Tech’s outrageous censorship of Americans, including doctors, who raise questions about the COVID-19 response. The Biden administration should stop stonewalling and release the records about the CDC’s role in suppressing the free speech of Americans. ICE ARRESTED 60% FEWER ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS IN FEBRUARY As I noted in my recent CPAC [ [=], Joe Biden “has launched the most significant attack on immigration law in American history.” And the consequences are a humanitarian, national security, and public health disaster on the border. Here, from our Corruption Chronicles blog, are details [==] of “Biden’s Border Crisis”: Predictably, the Biden administration’s disastrous immigration policies are having a detrimental impact on the U.S. even though they have only been in place for weeks. In that short time, the nation has seen an overwhelming flood of illegal alien minors slam Customs and Border Protection (CBP) and a huge drop in adult fugitives arrested by Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE). Last month the administration restricted [==] ICE from making arrests by reducing agents’ enforcement priorities and forcing them to seek written permission from senior supervisors before arresting fugitives. Not surprisingly, it has resulted in a huge decrease in illegal immigrant arrests. ICE data reviewed by a mainstream newspaper reveals that the number of illegal aliens arrested by ICE dropped more than 60% in February compared with the last three months of the Trump administration. Deportations fell by nearly the same amount, according to the figures. In the meantime, more than 7,000 illegal immigrant minors [] were placed in U.S. shelters in February alone, according to government data published by a separate national news outlet days earlier. “The numbers in March indicate the steady rise has continued,” the story reads. “During the first four days of the month, more than 1,500 unaccompanied migrant minors were taken into custody.” The Office of Refugee Resettlement (ORR), a well-funded branch of the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), is charged with providing care for illegal aliens under the age of 18 which are classified as Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC) by the government. ORR has been receiving an average of 337 UAC a day. “The figure for the first full month of the Biden administration is the most migrant children the refugee office has ever received in a February,” the news article states. Just a few weeks ago, Judicial Watch reported that the UAC influx is prompting a health emergency on the southern border and surrounding communities. The increasing number of UAC illegally crossing the border will soon overwhelm facilities in the middle of a global pandemic, according to a congressional delegation’s letter [=] to Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas. “This surge also has the capability to cause a COVID-19 outbreak at ports of entry and other CBP facilities, which threatens the health of CBP personnel and could result in the temporary closures of ports of entry,” the legislators who sit on various House committees—including civil rights, national security, and the environment—write. “Such closures would greatly impact commerce and hamper the United States’ economic recovery,” the lawmakers continue. “The increase in illegal immigration at the southern border presents a risk not only to Border Patrol agents apprehending migrants who illegally cross the border, but also to those communities into which those individuals will relocate—likely leading to widespread COVID-19 infection and fatalities.” Concerns associated with the new onslaught in illegal immigration are not limited to health issues. The attorney general in Montana points out that methamphetamine trafficked by Mexican drug cartels has wracked his state [=]. “The problem will only be made worse if the Biden administration continues to allow criminals to stay in the country,” according to Montana Attorney General Austin Knudsen. This month Knudsen and his counterpart in Arizona, sued the Biden administration to block the outrageous directive restricting ICE from arresting illegal immigrants. “Blindly releasing thousands of people, including convicted criminals and those that may be spreading COVID-19 into our state, is both unconscionable and a violation of federal law,” said Arizona Attorney General Mark Brnovich. “This must be stopped now to avoid a dangerous humanitarian crisis for the immigrants and the people of Arizona.” Their lawsuit asserts that Biden’s new policy will lead to an increase in criminals and drugs as well as COVID-19 in Montana and Arizona. It will also cause a hike in healthcare and law enforcement costs, according to the complaint, which lists a multitude of government agencies among defendants, including the Department of Homeland Security (DHS). “The Removal Moratorium will directly increase the number of aliens with final orders of removal who remain in Arizona because they will not have been removed by DHS,” the complaint says. “Additionally, knowledge that DHS has issued a blanket moratorium on removals will encourage additional unauthorized immigration to Arizona, and this increase in population will increase Arizona’s incurred law enforcement and healthcare services costs related to them.” Embedded in the court document are statements from law enforcement officials who claim the states will be hurt by the new initiatives. CLEAR THINKING ON ELECTIONS FROM CLARENCE THOMAS The controversies of the 2020 election haven’t gotten much traction yet in the courts. However, U.S. Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas, speaking for some of his colleagues, is unafraid to deal with the legal issues of the 2020 election crisis. Our chief investigative reporter, Micah Morrison, sets forth [] Thomas’ thinking in his Investigative Bulletin. The Supreme Court shut the door on the 2020 election late last month, but Justice Clarence Thomas got the last word. In a dissent directed at the court’s decision not to take up two cases involving the Pennsylvania Supreme Court and mail-in ballots, Thomas encapsulated the world of electoral woe surrounding the 2020 presidential contest. “We failed to settle this dispute before the election,” Thomas wrote, “and thus provide clear rules. Now we again fail to provide clear rules for future elections. The decision to leave election law hidden beneath a shroud of doubt is baffling. By doing nothing, we invite further confusion and erosion of voter confidence.” The Pennsylvania cases centered on which state bodies have the ultimate authority to set election rules, the legislature or the judiciary? The U.S. Constitution says that the “Times, Places and Manner of holding Elections...shall be prescribed in each State by the Legislature thereof.” But state courts often intervene. In the run-up to the presidential election, the Pennsylvania state legislature gave all Pennsylvania voters the option of casting mail-in ballots. But it left in place a November 3 deadline for ballots to be in. Unhappy with the deadline, Democrats sued, arguing that in light of the Covid-19 pandemic, the deadline violated a voting-rights clause in the state constitution stating that elections “shall be free and equal.” The Pennsylvania Supreme Court agreed, extending the deadline for mail-in ballots by three days. The U.S. Supreme Court declined petitions to intervene in the case before the election. In February, with the election settled, petitioners tried again. The high court again declined to hear the cases, prompting the Thomas dissent. It’s worth reading in its entirety [=]. Thomas zeroes in on two key issues: legislative versus judicial power, and problems with mail-in voting. Both “before and after the 2020 election,” Thomas notes, “non-legislative officials in various States took it upon themselves to set the rules,” resulting in “an unusually high number of petitions and emergency applications” to the high court. The Pennsylvania changes undermine confidence in the electoral system. “Changing the rules in the middle of the game is bad enough,” Thomas writes. “Such rule changes by officials who may lack the authority to do so is even worse.” Thomas is clear-sighted on the problems of mail-in voting. “Voting by mail was traditionally limited to voters who had defined, well-documented reasons to be absent,” he notes. But in recent years, “many States have become more permissive, a trend greatly accelerated by Covid-19.” The opportunity for cheating in mail-in or absentee balloting is substantial, Thomas writes. He cites a 2012 New York Times article [=] that notes the “vastly more prevalent” risk of fraud in mail-in balloting. He cites ballot fraud cases in Pennsylvania and North Carolina. He reminds us that Heather Gerken—now dean of Yale Law School—told the Times in the same article that absentee voting allows for “simpler and more effective alternatives to commit fraud.” At Judicial Watch, we’ve been tracking ballot fraud for years. We’ve noted that as far back as 2005, the bi-partisan Carter-Baker Commission warned that “absentee ballots remain the largest source of potential voter fraud.” In July, we pointed to California Governor Gavin Newsom’s rapid escalation of mail-in voting and reported on a New Jersey fraud case. Read the JW bulletin here [=]. The thanks Justice Thomas got for his rigorous dissent was to be attacked by Democrats and the progressive media. But the complex issues surrounding election fraud aren’t going away. The country owes Clarence Thomas a debt of gratitude for his clear thinking on the coming crisis. Until next week, [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [==] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2021, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

body:
Fellow Conservative:

Senate RINOs are calling it quits!

Senators Richard Burr (R-NC), Rob Portman (R-OH),
Pat Toomey (R-PA), Dick Shelby (R-AL), and Roy Blunt (R-MO) have
all announced their retirements - dealing a major blow to the
Republican establishment's inner circle.

The mainstream media believes these departures are a
loss for the Republican Party, but they actually create a unique
opportunity to replace weak Republicans next year with strong
conservatives who will truly fight for our principles and values.

In addition to these open seats, there are also
vulnerable Democrats on the ballot in Arizona, Georgia, and New
Hampshire.

But electing rock-solid conservatives in these
states won't be easy. Senator McConnell and his allies are
already working to recruit candidates who will maintain business
as usual.

Please help elect true conservative leaders to the
U.S. Senate by supporting the Senate Conservatives Fund today!

President Trump is right. Supporting RINOs is
pointless.

But that's what the GOP establishment and their
political committees do. They're even supporting pro-impeachment
Republicans like Lisa Murkowski (R-AK).

Now is the time for conservatives to make 2022 an
earthquake election like 2016 that weakens the political
establishment.

We can do it, but only if we take early action to
recruit and fund strong conservative candidates ahead of the
primary elections next year.

You can help by making a one-time or monthly
contribution to the Senate Conservatives Fund.

No other conservative group has upset the Senate GOP
establishment more than SCF.

We're a real threat to the Senate power-brokers
because they know they can't buy us off like many other so-called
conservative groups and because we put real money behind the
candidates we endorse.

Your support is so important that if you give $25 or
more, we will send you a copy of Senator Josh Hawley's upcoming
book, The Tyranny of Big Tech, as a way to thank you for your
support.

Please take action right now and help us take
advantage of the opportunities in 2022 to build a conservative
Senate.

Thank you for considering this important request and
for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

DONATE HERE

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Important lawsuits digging into Biden family corruption
body:
America is facing a worsening crisis of uncontrolled illegal immigration from the dangerously radical Biden Immigration Agenda!

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Today, Judicial Watch is confronting our biggest, and I believe _most important_ set of challenges in 27 years.
They include but are not limited to our important lawsuits digging into Biden family corruption and radical Biden administration efforts to gut our laws against illegal immigration. And as they say, these are very big deals...which is why I hope you will **_[make your best donation to Judicial Watch right now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53134&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTMxMDM5MjE=)_**.
Not surprisingly, Biden administration lawyers are already hard at work fighting our lawful open records requests in the courts. Plus, calls for legal and investigative assistance we are receiving from conservative groups around the country are _accelerating_.
Many concerned citizens and honest public officials are seeking our expert help to enforce the rule of law. Threats range from additional Leftist assaults on election integrity and Big Tech efforts to silence conservatives. And we continue the all-important fight for accountability in the seditious Deep State efforts to destroy the Trump presidency.
_I do not want to have to turn away even one important corruption, open government, illegal immigration or election integrity case_ as demands on us are at an all-time high. That is why **_[I hope you will make your best donation to Judicial Watch now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53134&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTMxMDM5MjE=)_**.
With your support, we will:
* **Aggressively move forward with our Biden accountability lawsuits and investigations into Biden family corruption, plus more Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests concerning Biden administration unlawful moves to open our borders to a dangerous new wave of illegal immigration**.

* **Continue our legal challenges against illegal "sanctuary" policies that unlawfully prohibit local police from cooperating with federal immigration authorities**. The radical Biden immigration agenda makes our independent efforts in the courts to overturn illegal sanctuary policies - like our ongoing lawsuits against deadly sanctuary policies in **San Francisco** and **Santa Clara County, California** - _even more important_.

* **Add more resources to our highly successful election integrity work**. Voter fraud is aided by the failure of states to conform to the **National Voter Registration Act** requirement to clean their voter rolls. Combined with the failure of many states to require **Voter ID** at the polls and by mail makes it possible for ineligible individuals to vote. _We are currently pursuing more "clean the voter rolls" lawsuits against **Colorado** , **Illinois** , **North Carolina** and **Pennsylvania**_**...** _while at the same time keeping a close eye on Soros-funded groups pushing for "all mail-in" voting and ballot harvesting that further weaken safeguards against voter fraud_.

But there is much more to do in the coming days and months. Which is why I hope you will **_[make your best donation now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53134&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTMxMDM5MjE=)_** to help us get the job done. Judicial Watch is the one conservative institution in Washington that Americans can rely on to stand firm for the rule of law.
We are conservative...we are independent...we hold _both_ Democrats _and_ Republicans accountable to the rule of law...and _we are fighting for you_! Thank you for your **_[support!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53134&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTMxMDM5MjE=)_**

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Liberals putting us in danger
body:
Defunding the police will make our communities less safe.
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F6R2J-fwH7G_nsSg9QQUUT6VQntd0MZZhgl4Q85bFqivLEEw_1-8I0mlHksKp8-MAOoDiyKdzLqpuBW4VX-C2aaO5VXkKGMO8nFizKSnY5jTg64umMnCUzUGBYjpCBJTfNv71Hsk5e_J8E0can3f83X5H7C1w1RijcRGlCJumsoM2e_D86_l6dNh11c8RO6WeTj8Tl5PJUM=&c=AmcgryTjneHr-BaYNej2ka9QQi8DG7TWuNUBLY7cAyzXVbUR0GEFcQ==&ch=K8XX-jrtiPrqegHGEMG5T2flF4Hkl7gSd7J8otj50wNimgVeHkOB8w==)
---
| Patriot,
I was on the House floor recently speaking out against the new proposed police "reform" bill being pushed by liberals in D.C.
Unfortunately, the bill passed the House...but I am not accepting defeat. I sent a letter to all my colleagues who voted in favor of the bill and urged them to reconsider their decision.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F6R2J-fwH7G_nsSg9QQUUT6VQntd0MZZhgl4Q85bFqivLEEw_1-8I0mlHksKp8-MAOoDiyKdzLqpuBW4VX-C2aaO5VXkKGMO8nFizKSnY5jTg64umMnCUzUGBYjpCBJTfNv71Hsk5e_J8E0can3f83X5H7C1w1RijcRGlCJumsoM2e_D86_l6dNh11c8RO6WeTj8Tl5PJUM=&c=AmcgryTjneHr-BaYNej2ka9QQi8DG7TWuNUBLY7cAyzXVbUR0GEFcQ==&ch=K8XX-jrtiPrqegHGEMG5T2flF4Hkl7gSd7J8otj50wNimgVeHkOB8w==)
---
| | | [WATCH KAT STAND UP FOR OUR POLICE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F6R2J-fwH7G_nsSg9QQUUT6VQntd0MZZhgl4Q85bFqivLEEw_1-8I0mlHksKp8-MAOoDiyKdzLqpuBW4VX-C2aaO5VXkKGMO8nFizKSnY5jTg64umMnCUzUGBYjpCBJTfNv71Hsk5e_J8E0can3f83X5H7C1w1RijcRGlCJumsoM2e_D86_l6dNh11c8RO6WeTj8Tl5PJUM=&c=AmcgryTjneHr-BaYNej2ka9QQi8DG7TWuNUBLY7cAyzXVbUR0GEFcQ==&ch=K8XX-jrtiPrqegHGEMG5T2flF4Hkl7gSd7J8otj50wNimgVeHkOB8w==)
---
| I am willing to fly to any district across the country and arrange a ridealong with anyone in favor of this bill. I am determined to show them the real dangers on the street, the real bravery of our officers, and the many lives that could be lost. Whether they want to see it or not, I will show them.
[This bill impacts me directly and it impacts the communities in my district and across the country. My husband is a first responder and I have seen firsthand how dangerous 911 calls can be and the life-threatening challenges our officers have to face.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F6R2J-fwH7G_nsSg9QQUUT6VQntd0MZZhgl4Q85bFqivLEEw_1-8I0mlHksKp8-MAOoDiyKdzLqpuBW4VX-C2aaO5VXkKGMO8nFizKSnY5jTg64umMnCUzUGBYjpCBJTfNv71Hsk5e_J8E0can3f83X5H7C1w1RijcRGlCJumsoM2e_D86_l6dNh11c8RO6WeTj8Tl5PJUM=&c=AmcgryTjneHr-BaYNej2ka9QQi8DG7TWuNUBLY7cAyzXVbUR0GEFcQ==&ch=K8XX-jrtiPrqegHGEMG5T2flF4Hkl7gSd7J8otj50wNimgVeHkOB8w==)
I asked my colleagues, are you waking up at 2 am to respond to a murder? Are you missing your kid's birthday for an emergency call?
Defunding the police will expose our officers. It will take the protective gear off their backs. It will make our communities less safe.
---
| | | [HELP KAT FIGHT THE DEFUND THE POLICE MOVEMENT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F6R2J-fwH7G_nsSg9QQUUT6VQntd0MZZhgl4Q85bFqivLEEw_1-8I0mlHksKp8-MAOoDiyKdzLqpuBW4VX-C2aaO5VXkKGMO8nFizKSnY5jTg64umMnCUzUGBYjpCBJTfNv71Hsk5e_J8E0can3f83X5H7C1w1RijcRGlCJumsoM2e_D86_l6dNh11c8RO6WeTj8Tl5PJUM=&c=AmcgryTjneHr-BaYNej2ka9QQi8DG7TWuNUBLY7cAyzXVbUR0GEFcQ==&ch=K8XX-jrtiPrqegHGEMG5T2flF4Hkl7gSd7J8otj50wNimgVeHkOB8w==)
---
| What happens when we defund the police? Crime and homicide.
Portland homicide increased by 700%
Atlanta homicide increased by 80%
Minneapolis homicide increased by 66%
All these cities defunded their police.
If we want better community response and a better relationship with our police, we need to fully fund - NOT defund.
---

| Thank you,

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. But we must win back the House majority to STAND UP to the Radical Left. == Thank you, Congressman Drew Ferguson == Paid for by Drew Ferguson For Congress Drew Ferguson For Congress is committed to restoring a Republican majority in the House. This message was sent to %%Email%% because you are a member of our Conservative grassroots movement. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013f5h8xotVmcWgic7pPAdBGvBBxCTvFpUSSCPjm8Y46V1OYN8IPTQ595cdZ2KwxU99Om-OzCNE0_4JJtON7Z5WHeHJ41KgvyTU-xRNtzEu6wfoSRoi1S5Y2dTWcBAPI-iMgG-bUFzQQQ=&c=Ck7tfnqhhPwAvlfxo2pjMfKtpDtOuc9VE4wDqd0f7RfVps4OQhLbbw==&ch=0Rad3s2Yts0w1glq11E5crHhszaCp4J2Gx7CFK-SZxOK_usig4DMPQ==).

We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. Because of Governor Reynolds and her bold agenda, **Iowa is leading the nation**. Our unemployment rate is the **3rd lowest** in the country, our GDP growth is outpacing the nation, and we are ranked as the #1 state in opportunity by U.S. News and World Report.
Governor Newsom and Governor Cuomo are doing exactly the opposite, **which is why New York and California remain in shambles and need a D.C. blue state bailout.**

clean_body: Will you step up? == Friend, Kim Reynolds is working hard to keep Iowa moving, keeping our state open safely and responsibly... but the Democrats in both Washington and here in Iowa are fighting back hard. We need your help to meet our mid-month fundraising goal by this coming Monday at 11:59 PM. == == == == == == == Because of Governor Reynolds and her bold agenda, Iowa is leading the nation. Our unemployment rate is the 3rd lowest in the country, our GDP growth is outpacing the nation, and we are ranked as the #1 state in opportunity by U.S. News and World Report. Governor Newsom and Governor Cuomo are doing exactly the opposite, which is why New York and California remain in shambles and need a D.C. blue state bailout. Democrats across the country have their eyes on Kim Reynolds and don't like what they're seeing. She is standing up to the status quo and proving that the radical left's agenda simply doesn 't work. body:
We need your help to take back the House! &zwnj
Hi, Friend, it's Congresswoman Stephanie Bice! Ashley and I were elected this past November into a historic GOP freshman class with a record number of conservative women. Ashley and I were both state legislators with a record of putting our communities first. Together, we're bringing that same commitment to Congress by fighting tooth and nail against the far left's nonsense agenda that puts Washington pork projects before hard-working Americans like you. Republican women like Ashley and I are leading the fight to help take back the House and we need your help! _**Can we count on you to help us take back the House by chipping in $22 right now?**_

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: America needs Dr. Seuss
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We're counting on you to SAVE Dr. Seuss from the toxic cancel culture plaguing our nation and stand up to the Left's censorship.

Friend,

To this day, Dr. Seuss remains a quintessential American author whose influence remains unmatched. He sells millions of books and gets nearly as many children interested in reading each year.

_**And yet, the Democrats have declared Dr. Seuss CANCELLED.**_

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S0HmwlQH_q-_wP8EwvXLgmNbguZjtuW9NixVzq9rvWnUX5HdgKIkZ3pgeTUn8E3H-9PM1kd2Vgt1oVgF8H5h43_komqEQQLfLDey9vQFkyjby5E3IOqy5qA8dn1deqdaKn1TVgXY-FjG39-1ETr6Imt11TuNN2saSpDykvk02Dljlsr6AJ_-hwnbhQ7SwKRmKwP1kqBsNcHC8UcrqzZa5QyfWbHioMx5p3mv-r_HoFBEaU8t6g1CkrU5gXluk0_24Wk07Zr35S7O3FZTClg6KwjgsXNLABRzcVIsSyXliMJK0AH2_SQawoZtUWM0Yd2W-myIXzyEDz8oiOEbabcj7xI07imVOJgGZeb0gKu-bc4T6YgJdYBZwWR5ApkwmeJ50v-a0ZL_9gSYSVy8OmKqDcckDSSPougv&c=-LyXdC7yMzCHC_5_a9l2X_-2RPv4aiJyu4QOOLtk70tRpbXasMQ7VA==&ch=9jkFUAn71q0icuyJjzPPz6D4cyYU3xAmbm2wWvr4TCFurUYkm7T8kA==)

SAVE DR. SEUSS FROM THE RADICAL LEFT
[**CLAIM YOUR COPY OF "THE CAT IN THE HAT"**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S0HmwlQH_q-_wP8EwvXLgmNbguZjtuW9NixVzq9rvWnUX5HdgKIkZ3pgeTUn8E3H-9PM1kd2Vgt1oVgF8H5h43_komqEQQLfLDey9vQFkyjby5E3IOqy5qA8dn1deqdaKn1TVgXY-FjG39-1ETr6Imt11TuNN2saSpDykvk02Dljlsr6AJ_-hwnbhQ7SwKRmKwP1kqBsNcHC8UcrqzZa5QyfWbHioMx5p3mv-r_HoFBEaU8t6g1CkrU5gXluk0_24Wk07Zr35S7O3FZTClg6KwjgsXNLABRzcVIsSyXliMJK0AH2_SQawoZtUWM0Yd2W-myIXzyEDz8oiOEbabcj7xI07imVOJgGZeb0gKu-bc4T6YgJdYBZwWR5ApkwmeJ50v-a0ZL_9gSYSVy8OmKqDcckDSSPougv&c=-LyXdC7yMzCHC_5_a9l2X_-2RPv4aiJyu4QOOLtk70tRpbXasMQ7VA==&ch=9jkFUAn71q0icuyJjzPPz6D4cyYU3xAmbm2wWvr4TCFurUYkm7T8kA==)

**We 're counting on you to SAVE Dr. Seuss from the toxic cancel culture plaguing our nation and stand up to the Left's censorship.**

[**If you chip in $25 right now, we 'll send you a copy of "The Cat in the Hat" as a thank you for defending Dr. Seuss from the "woke" liberals trying to take him down! Hurry, this offer won't last forever. We only have 104 copies remaining.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S0HmwlQH_q-_wP8EwvXLgmNbguZjtuW9NixVzq9rvWnUX5HdgKIkZ3pgeTUn8E3H-9PM1kd2Vgt1oVgF8H5h43_komqEQQLfLDey9vQFkyjby5E3IOqy5qA8dn1deqdaKn1TVgXY-FjG39-1ETr6Imt11TuNN2saSpDykvk02Dljlsr6AJ_-hwnbhQ7SwKRmKwP1kqBsNcHC8UcrqzZa5QyfWbHioMx5p3mv-r_HoFBEaU8t6g1CkrU5gXluk0_24Wk07Zr35S7O3FZTClg6KwjgsXNLABRzcVIsSyXliMJK0AH2_SQawoZtUWM0Yd2W-myIXzyEDz8oiOEbabcj7xI07imVOJgGZeb0gKu-bc4T6YgJdYBZwWR5ApkwmeJ50v-a0ZL_9gSYSVy8OmKqDcckDSSPougv&c=-LyXdC7yMzCHC_5_a9l2X_-2RPv4aiJyu4QOOLtk70tRpbXasMQ7VA==&ch=9jkFUAn71q0icuyJjzPPz6D4cyYU3xAmbm2wWvr4TCFurUYkm7T8kA==)

Our children aren't in classrooms, and our school systems are breaking down. Canceling one of America's most famous children's authors is the last thing we should be doing. We need to motivate them to read, not ban one of the most popular American authors to ever live.

**Cancel culture is toxic and the Left 's Dr. Seuss ban has far more nefarious motivations than simply removing a few titles from a library shelf. _Not only does the Radical Left want to silence opinions that contradict its own, but it wants to indoctrinate future generations with its socialist agenda._**

**Every press conference Cuomo held, he faced very few tough questions, and the media fawned over him. It even led to him getting an Emmy!**

Clearly, there’s something wrong when our free and independent press protects politicians and doesn’t do their due diligence.

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Infrastructure investment will create jobs now and help rebuild the middle class for decades
body:
The last year has been undeniably challenging for communities across the United States [](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=ca199df686c4496599e47373c02824a8&_e=9dYkudhrLrn2jHTNhsQJiwVF18AXQeujgi2fkjIeHDpiG72UMZ-5xqtUQwXO8rqaVevE6M1PlsjPC5bdnGSAC4IOStMEydpbCb6xneCRGAdZrUuT3h27tr8_MTticMkGUOlw1dxD6QeXt25OxEz3DVdkwQDdDheBK1CPJ8-1mlJXLHQode_1qZTz6uDiRnIBLA2NCTc2A1JH2JAC5J1OP-wrQZJZECkKOl8BgLC06gHhZGV42IcSe7pL9pmUt5AkJ2QtRJRSTZhObMYKB2fnhw%3D%3D) | |
---
**Infrastructure investment will create jobs now and help rebuild the middle class for decades**

By Bobby Jindal
|
---
The last year has been undeniably challenging for communities across the United States, leaving families and businesses reeling from an unprecedented one-two punch of health and economic hardships. Add to that the recent widespread power and drinking water failures that affected millions of people in the midst of extreme winter weather, and it is clear why a transformative investment in infrastructure should be a top priority for members of Congress, both Republicans and Democrats, in the months ahead.

Not only will enacting an ambitious infrastructure plan help keep people safe from the type of dangerous systemic breakdowns we have seen across the country, it will also help rebuild, grow, and strengthen our country’s middle class for years to come. As more people get vaccinated and we plot a path to post-pandemic prosperity, investing in our nation’s critical infrastructure will create the incentives needed to get people back to work now, and it will equip our economy for long-term economic growth and dominance on the world stage.

...

_Read the full article**[here](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=ca199df686c4496599e47373c02824a8&_e=9dYkudhrLrn2jHTNhsQJi39HiqoLNcBQEEFEj6JQ-xM-QanZQdQcB7VlLDDahsJZ3xP8C9ssachTIc4zpscfXPk0fV7aVx_OmSgfr0JRtLT4ZoO_lghNjU0I5u1dvuMD65iQPuR0qHxjvuyaiciwO8BHUJM8ecyhsfRho_7up1-MYmvGcH1EZeBXebDAkwjLjjsAdYY9OTEGi9TGga7TC0zBvAph7jrxx6OsNaT3CJ2tTibYTTJXBJyYkDhLrSlNihXVnuUc2QCLIc0Q_vAXZbgmv4s5Gk82L32-phcDxmUUHuyWY3gdMh8F8KHlNry8Lv0ckv2A5lnFN2XkIVpmm51I-Va47Ryk4sYZXaOR-NKhZfS2xV-pGEpuN_-dJf9nNNRm1dWlOvIILYfArmrwB-FP0PCNhhFJR7PXwUoMZnU%3D)**._

name: Senator Marsha Blackburn
subject: Help me stop illegal immigration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
It's up to Freedom Fighters, like you and I, to take a stand and make it known that we will not stand for open borders and illegal immigration! Will you add your name to my Border Security petition NOW?

The crisis at our nation's southern border has reached a breaking point as the Biden Administration has FAILED to take real action to secure our border.

Illegal immigration continues to surge to record-breaking levels as a direct result of the Democrats' inaction.

It's up to Freedom Fighters, like you and me, to take a stand and make it known that we will not stand for open borders and illegal immigration! [**Will you add your name to my Border Security petition NOW?**](https://act.marshablackburn.com/border-security/?utm_campaign=20210313_TY.101551_senator-marsha-blackburn_t1051202-1043&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.101551&utm_content=20210313_help-me-stop-illegal-immigration/)

**[**Add My Name**](https://act.marshablackburn.com/border-security/?utm_campaign=20210313_TY.101551_senator-marsha-blackburn_t1051202-1043&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.101551&utm_content=20210313_help-me-stop-illegal-immigration/)**
---

My goal is to get to 100 more signatures by midnight tonight! Your signature will help Senate Republicans and me in our fight against the Democrats' radical immigration agenda.

[**Add your signature NOW if you support all efforts to secure our southern border!**](https://act.marshablackburn.com/border-security/?utm_campaign=20210313_TY.101551_senator-marsha-blackburn_t1051202-1043&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.101551&utm_content=20210313_help-me-stop-illegal-immigration/)

Thank you,

Senator Marsha Blackburn

**[**Add My Name**](https://act.marshablackburn.com/border-security/?utm_campaign=20210313_TY.101551_senator-marsha-blackburn_t1051202-1043&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.101551&utm_content=20210313_help-me-stop-illegal-immigration/)**

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Cancel Cancel Culture
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-TXL5xlw5kBNsLaEeENFhi86WxpCyHImtltARl_VkoIRNknoC_Q2Tf9_aUzBBmLZcFI2N6Za01jBb1sZJusxlV2vzAH_SSe80bREHR8LFWRnxwYnEGkJHcZLuLtmjLk5KMfIsukD20xfY7AaSZJ8I4XR86o5OqeZiW9ahYG8PJyDQfkj9jvymQ==&c=P43GmDVvMi0VZMyV9NBhEpp3Zr43EF4IBOqsTDaxO-JoNWMIRVQfOQ==&ch=gGooqHxbxnRG3UI4rAdNeJn9v-qFjsy06Gu875-d4D4a-FF6PYRT3w==)
---
| Patriot,
Because of Trump Derangement Syndrome and the Left's inability to defend their radical policies, they resort to "canceling" their enemies. They set a double-standard and determine who is worthy of forgiveness, and who deserves to lose their job and have their life destroyed.
The mainstream media has joined in on this cancel culture and also gets to decide who is irredeemable.
It's time to cancel cancel culture. It is destroying our country and preventing any meaningful debate on issues important to Americans.
---
| | | [CANCEL "CANCEL CULTURE"](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-TXL5xlw5kBNsLaEeENFhi86WxpCyHImtltARl_VkoIRNknoC_Q2Tf9_aUzBBmLZcFI2N6Za01jBb1sZJusxlV2vzAH_SSe80bREHR8LFWRnxwYnEGkJHcZLuLtmjLk5KMfIsukD20xfY7AaSZJ8I4XR86o5OqeZiW9ahYG8PJyDQfkj9jvymQ==&c=P43GmDVvMi0VZMyV9NBhEpp3Zr43EF4IBOqsTDaxO-JoNWMIRVQfOQ==&ch=gGooqHxbxnRG3UI4rAdNeJn9v-qFjsy06Gu875-d4D4a-FF6PYRT3w==)
---
| Because the Democrat Party controls the mainstream media and national cultural figures (Hollywood actors, the NFL, the NBA, etc.), they are able to use their power to destroy the lives of conservatives and their other "enemies."
This is not about social justice or building a better society. It's about power.
---
| | | [HELP ME CANCEL "CANCEL CULTURE"](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-TXL5xlw5kBNsLaEeENFhi86WxpCyHImtltARl_VkoIRNknoC_Q2Tf9_aUzBBmLZcFI2N6Za01jBb1sZJusxlV2vzAH_SSe80bREHR8LFWRnxwYnEGkJHcZLuLtmjLk5KMfIsukD20xfY7AaSZJ8I4XR86o5OqeZiW9ahYG8PJyDQfkj9jvymQ==&c=P43GmDVvMi0VZMyV9NBhEpp3Zr43EF4IBOqsTDaxO-JoNWMIRVQfOQ==&ch=gGooqHxbxnRG3UI4rAdNeJn9v-qFjsy06Gu875-d4D4a-FF6PYRT3w==)
---
| Are these the kind people you want to decide if YOU can have an unpopular opinion and express that opinion using your First Amendment rights?
What about determining whether YOU should be forgiven for a mistake you made in your past?
We need to stand together. The time is now to say your piece and join the fight, otherwise tomorrow we might be "canceled" if this toxic behavior continues to get worse. name: Team AOC
subject: The week everything changed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
March 11, 2020 was the day that marked the beginning of the new normal.
#
Friends -
March 11, 2020 was the day that marked the beginning of the new normal.
It was a Wednesday, and the World Health Organization had officially categorized COVID-19 as a pandemic. An NBA game was halted just before tip off, and some major public figures began sharing they had been infected by the virus.
In the one-year since, the losses we’ve suffered have been tremendous. New York City, especially NY-14, was hit first and worst – and our communities are still reeling today.
Many members of our community continue to face food insecurity, and Team AOC has invested in fundraising efforts and partnerships to support local organizations’ food distribution programs during COVID and beyond.
Last Saturday, Loving the Bronx, Giving Friends, and Team AOC joined forces to distribute 500 coats for children and over 200 bags of fresh produce and dry foods to Bronx families.
**Through emails like this one, our campaign has raised over $1.25 million for mutual aid and other relief programs, and we need your help to continue to provide urgent relief to those in need.**
**[In honor of the one-year anniversary of the COVID lock down, will you split a $6 donation today between Loving the Bronx and Elmcor to support their COVID relief efforts?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8154?refcode=em20210313-1943&amounts=6%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1943%2E2526796%2EsSxNN2)**
**[Donate $6 to COVID Relief](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8154?refcode=em20210313-1943&amounts=6%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1943%2E2526796%2EsSxNN2)**
_100% of your donation will go directly to these relief organizations._
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8154?refcode=em20210313-1943&amounts=6%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1943%2E2526796%2EsSxNN2)
Unprecedented times take unprecedented efforts to make sure our neighbors are being supported. That’s why we mobilized a full COVID response operation including:
* 200,000 community check in calls
* 80,000 meals to families in need
* 100,000 masks to teachers, small businesses, and essential workers
* Organized 18,000 volunteers as part of our Homework Helpers program to tutor kids one-on-one in remote learning

Not only are we providing direct relief in our community, but Alexandria successfully lobbied and won funeral assistance so that families who’ve lost a loved one to the virus are eligible for reimbursement of up to $7,000 for the expenses of laying a loved one to rest.
Alexandria’s work in Congress and in the district is made possible through grassroots donations. We know times are difficult, so if you’re not in a place to donate – we understand.
**[If you’re able, please split a $6 donation today to help us continue to provide direct assistance and advocate for COVID relief for all.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8154?refcode=em20210313-1943&amounts=6%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=1943%2E2526796%2EsSxNN2)**
With thanks,
Team AOC
**[Donate $6 to COVID Relief](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8154?refcode=em20210313-1943&amounts=6%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=1943%2E2526796%2EsSxNN2)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210313-1943-footer&t=6&refcode2=1943_2526796_sSxNN2&akid=1943%2E2526796%2EsSxNN2)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=1943%2E2526796%2EsSxNN2) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=1943%2E2526796%2EsSxNN2) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=1943%2E2526796%2EsSxNN2)
Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=10&akid=1943%2E2526796%2EsSxNN2)**. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=1943%2E2526796%2EsSxNN2). To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
Email us: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: Tim Scott
subject: Where's the unity?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
Democrats will stop at nothing to see their progressive policies become law. With a 50-50 split vote in the Senate, they're using Kamala Harris to break ties on their extreme bills. That's not unity, %%First Name%%.
Friend,

Joe Biden has been in the White House for nearly two months and I'm still looking for the "unity" that he preached about during his first days in office.

Democrats will stop at nothing to see their progressive policies become law. With a 50-50 split vote in the Senate, they're using Kamala Harris to break ties on their extreme bills. That's not unity, Friend.

Winning back the Senate in 2022 has never been more important for Republicans. I need your help to stand up to the Democrats right now and win back the Senate. **[Will you chip in to help me defend conservative values and win back the Republican Senate Majority?](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/this-isnt-unity/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210313_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1051623-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210313_wheres-the-unity)**

---

The Senate should be focused on getting people back to work and children back in schools. But Joe Biden and Senate Democrats are instead looking for ways to run up the tab on future generations by spending on progressive wish lists.

It's time to put an end to this right now. **[Will you stand with me today and help Republicans win back the Senate before Democrats spend us into oblivion?](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/this-isnt-unity/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210313_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1051623-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210313_wheres-the-unity)**
